description: Letter from Yefet b. ʿE[li] the cantor Ibn al-Jāzfīnī to the dignitary Moshe b. Ghulayb ha-Kohen. The sender wishes to get a position in Alexandria, Fustat, or Cairo. He mentions his pain for the death of "the lily" (אלשושנה) of Abū Isḥāq (a daughter?), and how he offered condolences by saying that "the owner of the deposit (=God) has retrieved it." He reports that Abū l-Surūr has traveled to Aden. (Information in part from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
